ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of players in the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team participates in */,
  "team_manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the team manager */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the team manager */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the team manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the match */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date when the match was played */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored against the team */,
  "match_location" TEXT /* Location where the match was played */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match (Win, Loss, Draw) */,
  "game_length" INTEGER /* Length of the game in minutes */,
  "game_attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the standings entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Total matches played by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses by the team */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Total draws by the team */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the team */,
  "league_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the field */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach manages */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "coaching_license" TEXT /* Coaching license held by the coach */,
  "coaching_style" TEXT /* Coaching style of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the league season */,
  "league_type" TEXT /* Type of the league (e.g., recreational, competitive) */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes played by the player in the match */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player in the match */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player in the match */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player in the match */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of the injury (e.g., muscle strain, broken bone) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the injury (e.g., active, recovered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playoffs" (
  "playoff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playoff */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league */,
  "playoff_name" TEXT /* Name of the playoff */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoff */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoff */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playoff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoffs_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., update, match result, statistic) */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
